issue_title: ordered list in notes doesnt show numbers in rich text editor
issue_body_preview:
### Please make a clear and concise description of what the bug is.
Seemingly https://github.com/nextcloud/text/issues/1043 is back, just for notes.
The ordered list does not show numbers while being in the rich text editor.

<!--

Please note, that

- issues with the Android app have to be reported
test_description_zh: 在 Nextcloud Notes 中创建一条新笔记，切换到富文本编辑器模式，使用工具栏或快捷键插入一个有序列表（ordered list），输入若干条目，观察列表项前面是否显示数字编号。
expected_result_zh: 在富文本编辑器中，有序列表的每一项前面应正确显示递增的数字编号（1. 2. 3. …），而非空白或无序符号。
